[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000001 1
1 01101010 4
2 00010001 2
3 10110010 4
4 10111001 5
5 01110010 4
6 01100010 3
7 00010001 2

67 76 01111011 6
70 07 11010011 5
